name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Clearing Windows Console History
notes:
This Building Block identifies when a user attempts to clear console history. An adversary may clear the command history of a compromised account to conceal the actions undertaken during an intrusion.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Austin Songer @austinsonger
SIGMA Title: Clearing Windows Console History
SIGMA Description: Identifies when a user attempts to clear console history. An adversary may clear the command history of a compromised account to conceal the actions undertaken during an intrusion.

Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Clearing Windows Console History on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Command Execution Success

when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%clear-history%' or (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%remove-item%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%rm%') and (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%consolehost_history.txt%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%(get-psreadlineoption).historysavepath%')) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Clearing Windows Console History on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Command Execution Success

AND when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%clear-history%' or (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%remove-item%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%rm%') and (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%consolehost_history.txt%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%(get-psreadlineoption).historysavepath%')) AQL filter query
